mapper.insert: insert into product(categoryId, brandId, modelName,imgUrl ,description, marketPrice, recycleBasePrice, stock) values (#{categoryId}, #{brandId}, #{modelName}, #{imgUrl},#{description}, #{marketPrice}, #{recycleBasePrice}, #{stock})
mapper.update: update product set description = #{description}, marketPrice = #{marketPrice}, recycleBasePrice = #{recycleBasePrice}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl}, stock = #{stock} where id = #{id}
update product set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from product
and modelName like concat('%', #{modelName}, '%')

select * from product
and status = 1
and modelName like concat('%', #{modelName}, '%')
select * from product where categoryId = #{categoryId} and status = 1
select * from product where brandId = #{brandId} and status = 1
